MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ALBERT CHENG, ANNE CHENG, JOHN NGAU AND MOLLY FONG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION IS Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Mar-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alison M. Crane, Esq. and Stefani M. Salt, Esq. of Bledsoe Cathcart Diestel Pedersen & Treppa, Tel. 415.981.5411, for defendants and moving party;
Gregory P. Brock, Esq. of Brock Law Office, Tel. 510.841.1171, and Gabriel L. Bellman, Esq. of Bellman Legal, Tel. 415.931.2599, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DANIEL SULLIVAN, JUANITA SULLIVAN, and CARL OLSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - The Court grants the motion for summary judgment. Defendant did not owe a duty of care to plaintiff. The evidence shows that plaintiff's misuse of the skylight was unforeseeable, the skylight did not pose a dangerous or defective condition on the premises, there were no previous injuries on the roof due to the skylight, and it is undisputed that plaintiff's general practice was to prohibit persons from accessing the roof. Plaintiff's authorities are inapposite because they involve the situation where the landowner invited the injured plaintiff onto the premises and in this case, plaintiff was trespassing. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
